---

## ✅ Workflow saved

**File:** `/Users/ADMIN/Documents/UNI SYDNEY/5. SYD SPRING 2026/QBUS3600/Main project/qbus3600_abs-zombies/agent-system/outputs_unification/_generated_workflow.yaml`

**14 steps · 2 agents · 15 unique keys · All chains valid**

---

### Steps list (for engine injection)

```yaml
- name: phase0_phase1
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Phase 0 + Phase 1 — Globals & Data Pipeline. Create the notebook skeleton. Write Section 0 cells (imports, GLOBAL CONSTANTS, OUTPUTS dirs, seed broadcast). Then Phase 1 cells: copy every cell from 'Clean + Interact.ipynb' with fixes §1.1–§1.7."
  input_keys: []
  output_key: phase0_phase1_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase2
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Phase 2 — Shared Infrastructure. §2.1 load CSV, §2.2 feature defs, §2.3 two preprocessors, §2.4 stratified split, §2.5 SKF, §2.6 five utility functions, §2.7 accumulators."
  input_keys: [phase0_phase1_cells]
  output_key: phase2_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3a_logistic_regression
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3A — Logistic Regression (3 variants). Source: Logistics.ipynb. LR_L2, LR_L1, LR_L2_SMOTE."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3a_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3b_glm
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3B — GLM (load pre-computed). Try-load macro_f1_winner.pkl with fallback sm.Logit."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3b_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3c_gam
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3C — GAM. Source: GAM_notebook.ipynb. 2 variants: GAM_best + GAM_second."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3c_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3d_xgboost
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3D — XGBoost. Source: unicef_fast_boosting_models_cv.ipynb. 3 variants."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3d_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3e_catboost
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3E — CatBoost. Same source as 3D. 3 variants."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3e_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3f_lightgbm
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3F — LightGBM. Same source as 3D. 3 variants."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3f_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3g_random_forest
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3G — Random Forest. Source: RandomForest_v1.py. .py→notebook conversion. 3 variants."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3g_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase3h_neural_network
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Task 3H — Neural Network (2 variants). Source: Final_nn_modeling_sklearn_v3.ipynb. NN_best + NN_SMOTE_best + runner-up."
  input_keys: [phase2_cells]
  output_key: phase3h_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase4_model_comparison
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Phase 4 — Model Comparison. Leaderboard, top-25, 5 visualisations, best model statement."
  input_keys: [phase3a_cells, phase3b_cells, phase3c_cells, phase3d_cells, phase3e_cells, phase3f_cells, phase3g_cells, phase3h_cells]
  output_key: phase4_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase5_holdout_prediction
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Phase 5 — Holdout Prediction. clean_and_engineer(), predict top-25, fill submission template, 5 sanity checks."
  input_keys: [phase0_phase1_cells, phase4_cells]
  output_key: phase5_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase6_reproducibility
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Phase 6 — Reproducibility Checklist. 16-item boolean checklist, assert all True, print versions."
  input_keys: [phase5_cells]
  output_key: phase6_cells
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 300

- name: phase7_assembly
  agent: ml_notebook_coder
  task: "Assemble Unified Notebook. Merge all phase artifacts into Unified_Notebook.ipynb with merged imports, section headers, Python 3 kernel."
  input_keys: [phase0_phase1_cells, phase2_cells, phase3a_cells, phase3b_cells, phase3c_cells, phase3d_cells, phase3e_cells, phase3f_cells, phase3g_cells, phase3h_cells, phase4_cells, phase5_cells, phase6_cells]
  output_key: unified_notebook
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 600

- name: phase8_qa_audit
  agent: reviewer
  task: "QA Audit. Check against output file manifest + 16-item reproducibility checklist. MET/PARTIAL/MISSING verdicts + prioritised fix list."
  input_keys: [unified_notebook]
  output_key: qa_report
  parameters: {}
  retry_count: 1
  timeout_seconds: 300
```

---

### Validation report

| Check | Result |
|-------|--------|
| Agent names vs roster | ✅ `ml_notebook_coder` (general) + `reviewer` (general) — both found |
| Unique output_keys | ✅ 15 keys, all unique |
| Input→output chain integrity | ✅ All 22 input_key references resolve to a prior step's output_key |
| YAML parseability | ✅ Confirmed via `yaml.safe_load()` |
| Step count matches plan | ✅ 14 steps (Steps 1, 2, 3A–3H, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8) |
| Parallel group | Steps 3A–3H all depend only on `phase2_cells` — eligible for parallel execution |

**No validation errors. Workflow is ready to run.**
